caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses, wearing a light green top with decorative embroidery around the neckline, is speaking against a plain dark background. She is positioned centrally in the frame, gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. In the sequence, she begins by speaking with her mouth open and her right hand raised near her chest. As the sequence progresses, she continues talking, shifting her hand position slightly and adjusting her facial expression while maintaining a consistent posture. An "NPTEL" logo is visible in the bottom-left corner of the scene throughout the clip. The setting remains static, focusing entirely on the woman as she delivers her presentation, with no other people or objects present in the frame.
